title: Code with Claude 2026 | Tokyo
summary: Anthropic held Code with Claude 2026 in Tokyo, a conference featuring announcements about Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code, with demonstrations from partner organizations Canva, Mizuho, and NRI.
writeup: This video covers Anthropic's Code with Claude 2026 conference in Tokyo, which featured announcements spanning Claude models, the Claude Platform, and Claude Code. The session included demonstrations from partner organizations Canva, Mizuho, and NRI. It matters as a consolidated look at where Anthropic's developer-facing products and model lineup stand, presented through both product updates and real partner deployments.
